name: @robosystems/content-renderer
description: Playwright-based local renderer for the content machine. `capture`: drive the live RoboLedger UI (headless login → named scenes) → stills/clips for the showcase demo. `short`: mount design-system components → frame-accurate 9:16 motion → mp4. Consumes @robosystems/content-design-system; audio (VO/music) stays in the Python pipeline.
